programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
A Guide To Second Date Sex
Libertad
programme.desc: In the Spain of the early 19th century there is no place for everyone, much less for traitors. A woman nicknamed La Llanera is released from prison after 17 years.

programme.title: Libertad
programme.desc: In the Spain of the early 19th century there is no place for everyone, much less for traitors. A woman nicknamed La Llanera is released from prison after 17 years.

programme.title: Sam Jay: Salute Me or Shoot Me
All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone learns what it's like to be top six, Damon is faced with a decision, and Keisha reverts to her old ways. Meanwhile, Amara and Coach Marcus adjust to new challenges.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is at odds with her teammates, Damon is stressed about his decision, and Keisha is all in on her new dance major. Cam hits a snag with his financial aid.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone reclaims her power on and off the court, Damon ignoring his unresolved relationship with Jessie leads to conflict, and Cam has an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Amara gives everyone a mental health day. Simone struggles with relaxing, Damon feels insecure about his relationship with Thea, and coach Marcus steps up for Cam.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone is trying to break her long-running tennis curse by acing her presentation and dealing with boy drama, but a blast from her past brings its own drama.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone struggles with trying to balance her new "duties" and her loyalty to Nate, leaving her to question if she made the right decision.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: With Simone and Thea both ready to reclaim their spot on the court, their coach and teammates force them to deal with the lingering tension in unique ways.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: As midterms approach, Simone confides in her line sisters while Damon faces troubling grades and seeks solutions.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Keisha choreographs the Masquerade Dance, but takes out her frustrations on Cam. Plus, Simone and Thea contemplate their future, and Damon regrets following JR's advice.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: An unexpected encounter puts Simone and the Bringston tennis team in danger. Damon deals with a new basketball rival, and Nathaniel weighs a new challenge.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone and the team have a big decision to make. The Lions face off against a big rival, Cam goes to JR with a serious situation, and Nate has a tough choice to make.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone struggles with trying to balance her new "duties" and her loyalty to Nate, leaving her to question if she made the right decision.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: As midterms approach, Simone confides in her line sisters while Damon faces troubling grades and seeks solutions.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: An unexpected encounter puts Simone and the Bringston tennis team in danger. Damon deals with a new basketball rival, and Nathaniel weighs a new challenge.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone and the team have a big decision to make. The Lions face off against a big rival, Cam goes to JR with a serious situation, and Nate has a tough choice to make.

programme.title: All American: Homecoming
programme.desc: Simone has obstacles that help her decide between Damon and Lando. JR stands up for Cam, Damon gets advice, and Nate learns the truth about her secret admirer.

programme.title: Moonshine
programme.sub-title: You Try Reinventing Your Life In Your Forties Fuckers
programme.desc: With the developer of the luxury resort threatening to ruin the Moonshine, the Finley-Cullens wonder if things could get any worse.

programme.title: Moonshine
programme.desc: It's spa day for the Finley-Cullen sisters and Sammy as layers of dirty secrets and resentments are revealed. Ken and Ryan try to help Oscar get out of his funk via a ceremony involving a giant vulva.

programme.title: Moonshine
programme.desc: As news spreads that Lidia is working with the enemy, she tries to do damage control to get her family on her side, while the rest of the family try desperately to stop the build using whatever means necessary.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Everyone introduces imaginary friends as Greg Davies faces chaotic judging. Confusion reigns over the colour gold and an egg shelling task proves surprisingly hard.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: In this episode, we kick things off by enjoying a sprinkling of the white stuff in Snow Joke, before taking the law into our own hands and locking up some errant motorists Behind Bars.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess" "Worst Case Scenario" "Redneck Good Times" and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Michael Weatherly and Greg Proops feature as special guests.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Byambajav Ulambayar and Gary Anthony Williams feature as special guests.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants and Strangers team up for $50,000, facing an underwater test, eating vile picnic foods, and crawling beneath a moving train.

programme.title: Taskmaster 2022 NY Treat
programme.desc: In a festive one-off, Adrian Chiles, Claudia Winkleman, Jonnie Peacock, Lady Leshurr and Baroness Sayeeda Warsi contend with tasks involving eggs, vinegar and a long pole.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: The Valdimar's newly appointed American deckhand Greg Jones is battling debilitating injury. First mate Jon Jonsson personally escorts Greg to the doctor to have his wrist and knee injuries assessed.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Hold hands with the Pawn Stars when the original contract between The Beatles and their manager Brian Epstein invades the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Old Man sends Corey and Chum on a simple errand that turns into a day-long adventure. Will they make it back in one piece?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Get revved up with the Pawn Stars as Corey checks out a 1940 Buick said to have been owned by Fidel Castro.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey looks to cash in on a silver certificate when he finds an unexpected error. Will he be able to rack in the big bucks or be left with an empty wallet?

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: It's trial by fire for Russell McDonough as he hauls a mobile building down a load-destroying track. The Mackay brothers race daylight and deadlines moving a house down the highway.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The Mackay Brothers hit the bush and try to dodge destruction. Steve Grahame takes on an old enemy at the worst possible time of the year. Bumpa Farrell struggles for power on a hay convoy of epic proportions.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: The Meaning of Life
programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.title: The Meaning of Life
programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests John Rambo, he must make a daring escape and prepare himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous parachute drop, Rambo is left stranded in the jungles with only his combat knife and bow and arrows to protect him.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous parachute drop, Rambo is left stranded in the jungles with only his combat knife and bow and arrows to protect him.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Up In Smoke
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two free-spirited pot-heads decide to join forces in their endles search for substances to snort, smoke, or drop. This is the first film in the Cheech and Chong series.

programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two free-spirited pot-heads decide to join forces in their endles search for substances to snort, smoke, or drop. This is the first film in the Cheech and Chong series.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.desc: In the Dordogne, Tim and Owen complete their pool and terrace; in Normandy, Terry and Ashley fit a fireplace.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include some rather pricey whisky bottles and a silver 'parrot' ring by Mocheh Oved that brings back memories for John Benjamin.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include some rather pricey whisky bottles and a silver 'parrot' ring by Mocheh Oved that brings back memories for John Benjamin.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The team are at the antique shops of Newark. Presenter Charlie Ross helps the teams around the shops with experts Ben Cooper and Kate Bliss, while Charlie is in his element with a classic car collection.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 10-month-old baby is rushed in after her parents finds she has stopped breathing; a 21-year-old expectant dad falls 9m in a motorcycle crash.

programme.desc: Sara Pascoe throws a Christmas sewing bee extravaganza. To help her get into the festive spirit, she welcomes celebrity sewers the Rev Kate Bottley, Antony Cotton, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Anneka Rice.

programme.title: Find Me A Beach House
programme.desc: Giulia is looking for her ideal beachfront home in Mermaid Beach on the Gold Coast. She has always wanted to live right on the beach to enjoy what the ocean has to offer and the beach lifestyle.

programme.desc: Giulia is looking for her ideal beachfront home in Mermaid Beach on the Gold Coast. She has always wanted to live right on the beach to enjoy what the ocean has to offer and the beach lifestyle.

programme.desc: Jane Hall and Khanh Ong embrace Thailand with Bangkok luxury, river cruises, rooftop bars, Phuket beaches, spa rituals, and cooking classes.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey & Joel bought Adelaide's worst house. Tracey loves their 90-year-old home, but Joel finds it too small. Will Andrew find a better home, or will Neale's renovation solve it?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey & Joel bought Adelaide's worst house. Tracey loves their 90-year-old home, but Joel finds it too small. Will Andrew find a better home, or will Neale's renovation solve it?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Single mum of two Ali meets widower Nick during the first lockdown, and after having their first child together, they're looking to upsize in the picturesque village of Stilton.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Single mum of two Ali meets widower Nick during the first lockdown, and after having their first child together, they're looking to upsize in the picturesque village of Stilton.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Sydney's Bondi shines as Veronica helps Andrea and Scott find an art deco beach pad. Bryce searches for Greg and Kerry Anne's forever home in the Gold Coast hinterland.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: This house's towering, overpowering problem is so extreme that many prospective buyers turn around before getting out of the car. In the front yard stands an enormous electricity pylon.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Molly met Tom while backpacking. They fell in love and started life and a family in Mt Isa. With most of Molly's relatives based in Brisbane, including her ill father, the family wish to renovate, sell and move.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Unconventional is one way of describing woodwork enthusiast Bob's house overlooking the bush. 'The Gingerbread House' is the term that springs to Andrew's mind as he steps into this home.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Molly met Tom while backpacking. They fell in love and started life and a family in Mt Isa. With most of Molly's relatives based in Brisbane, including her ill father, the family wish to renovate, sell and move.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: This house's towering, overpowering problem is so extreme that many prospective buyers turn around before getting out of the car. In the front yard stands an enormous electricity pylon.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey and Joel say they bought the worst house in the best street in Adelaide. While local Pastor Tracey loves the character of their 90-year-old home, husband Joel is less of a fan and feels it's not big enough for their family of five. Can Andrew shine a light on better homes, or will Neale's renovation solve their dilemmas?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey & Joel bought Adelaide's worst house. Tracey loves their 90-year-old home, but Joel finds it too small. Will Andrew find a better home, or will Neale's renovation solve it?

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Brooke is rushed in after a severe asthma attack; Howard is treated for burns from an explosion at home; Colin is seen in minors after a cycling accident.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics attend an accident at the bus station, a feisty pensioner with Angina, a young mum with a suspected stroke, and a child hit by a cricket bat - plus visit a regular on palliative care struggling to breathe.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics attend an accident at the bus station, a feisty pensioner with Angina, a young mum with a suspected stroke, and a child hit by a cricket bat - plus visit a regular on palliative care struggling to breathe.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young gun takes a job in a law firm with connections to the Mafia and is soon caught up in blackmail.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Air Marshal Bill Marks receives cryptic text messages during a flight demanding the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account - or a passenger will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Air Marshal Bill Marks receives cryptic text messages during a flight demanding the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account - or a passenger will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne is racing to solve the mystery of his past while being hunted by the very organisation that hired him.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman unexpectedly gets caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home on a train.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman unexpectedly gets caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home on a train.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A criminal gang attempt one last job with more money at stake than ever. But their plans are interrupted by a detective, hell-bent on solving the case.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
programme.desc: A man fails a lie detector test and confesses to brutally murdering his pregnant wife Shan'ann and their two young daughters.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: A charismatic and elusive bank robber marked by the FBI as America's first Public Enemy No.1 is hunted relentlessly by top FBI agents.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: In 1947, a visionary architect and his wife flee post-war Europe to rebuild their legacy in the United States, but their lives are transformed by a mysterious, wealthy client.

programme.title: Santa Jaws
programme.desc: Trying to survive the family Christmas, Cody makes a wish to be alone, which ends up backfiring when a shark manifests and kills his entire family.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an eight-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Dangerous Animals
programme.desc: A shark-obsessed killer traps surfer Zephyr on his boat. She must escape before he feeds her to the sharks in a twisted ritual.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: A spacecraft transporting thousands of people to a distant planet has a malfunction in its sleep chambers, and as a result two passengers are awakened 90 years too early.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organisation's name.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Aliens have come to Earth in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, a man must come to the defence of his estranged children.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: In this reunion of the fast and the furious, the speedsters are off to Brazil to attempt to defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all wiped out.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: The Jackal and Bianca both descend on Tallinn in anticipation of UDC's announcement. With the venue in lockdown, and Bianca closing in, the Jackal must use all his wiles as he prepares to take his shot.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: As the vote on the mine is approaching, Maite goes along with Tomas' investigation.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: Just as the investigation is about to be closed and declared a cold case, Maite returns.

programme.title: Cheeky Business
programme.desc: On the eve of Christmas, Stephanie and Simon welcome Adelaide behind Toni's back to present their new project; Simon's parents and sister arrive at 3615 Monique's office to reconcile with him.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: The Irvines try to adapt to a new reality while Jenny uncovers clues that could shift the investigation.

programme.title: Cheeky Business
programme.desc: On the eve of Christmas, Stephanie and Simon welcome Adelaide behind Toni's back to present their new project; Simon's parents and sister arrive at 3615 Monique's office to reconcile with him.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The fragile truce between the vampires and Staten Island's werewolves is tested, and Colin Robinson finds romance with a new co-worker.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: When a working-class prime minister is elected, Robert is left snubbed. Thomas, unchanged, backs Baxter into a corner.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Rose makes an attempt to bring a wireless into the house while Violet plays cupid. Anna helps Mary in an unexpected way.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: As Edith's loses access to Marigold, there's news about Gregson. Thomas returns, unwell, Mary meets her match, and police suspicions narrow.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Rosamund is suspicious, Edith is desperate and Branson is pressured to choose his allegiances. Charles Blake hatches a plan, and Rose makes a new acquaintance.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: A new maid starts with Violent. Bates and Anna struggle to keep their secrets, while excitement and heartbreak rock Downton Abbey.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Bates' train ticket returns to the spotlight. Isobel encounters a surprising obstacle to happiness. An arrival brings new hope, while departures bring both relief and sorrow.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Preparations are underway for Rose's big day, but family tensions on both sides threaten to derail proceedings. Edith's arrangement with Marigold is working out well.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The Crawleys head to Northumberland for a shooting party at a castle, before returning to Downton to celebrate Christmas.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: The Irvines try to adapt to a new reality while Jenny uncovers clues that could shift the investigation.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: A revelation from Alcaras turns suspicion on the entire Irvine family, exposing a secret that could tear them apart.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: A poignant and often hilarious story about Shelby, a headstrong young girl about to get married, with six amazing women providing strength, friendship and love in a small southern town.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: A poignant and often hilarious story about Shelby, a headstrong young girl about to get married, with six amazing women providing strength, friendship and love in a small southern town.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Struggling to make sense of life after college, seven friends trade lovers, secrets and yada-yadas at their favourite college hang-out, until a final crisis forces them out of the nest.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Struggling to make sense of life after college, seven friends trade lovers, secrets and yada-yadas at their favourite college hang-out, until a final crisis forces them out of the nest.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is.

programme.title: Bird on a Wire
programme.desc: Hiding under the FBI witness protection program, a man gets nervous when an old flame recognises him. The two then find themselves thrown together on an exhilarating, cross-country odyssey.

programme.title: Bird on a Wire
programme.desc: Hiding under the FBI witness protection program, a man gets nervous when an old flame recognises him. The two then find themselves thrown together on an exhilarating, cross-country odyssey.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: This is a sinfully satisfying revenge romp that follows three women who are reunited by the death of a college friend, teaming up they embark on a mission to teach their cheating ex-husbands a lesson.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: The Princess and the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about a US marine stationed in Bahrain who falls in love with a member of the Bahrain royal family.

programme.title: The Princess and the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about a US marine stationed in Bahrain who falls in love with a member of the Bahrain royal family.

programme.title: Flashdance
programme.desc: Alex bravely fights her way out of the welding gear, off the stripper pole, and onto the dance school floor.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly and fall in love. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that one day meet again.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly and fall in love. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that one day meet again.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Heartbroken after the end of a relationship, a man falls for a new, advanced operating system - a bright, female voice, who is insightful and surprisingly funny.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Heartbroken after the end of a relationship, a man falls for a new, advanced operating system - a bright, female voice, who is insightful and surprisingly funny.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building in a modern Chinese city, she and her mischievous friends, Jin and Peng, name him Everest and embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family at the highest point on Earth. But the trio of friends will have to stay one-step ahead of Burnish, a wealthy man intent on capturing a Yeti, and zoologist Dr. Zara to help Everest get home.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known - and the least successful. But when Metro City is threatened by a new villain, can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Before he met the ogre Shrek, Puss in Boots (voice of Antonio Banderas) had a complicated life in which he was smeared with the blame of a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against Puss' wishes by Humpty Dumpty (Zach Galifianakis), who was captured while trying to escape - thanks to Puss leaving him to his fate in anger. The two lifelong friends break up and it isn't until they re-unite that they trust each other again.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into mouse burgers!

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Travel back to the stone-age in this big-budget treatment of the world's favourite prehistoric family! Fred Flintstone, a put-upon blue-collar worker struggling to squeak by, with the help of his best buddy Barney and his wife Wilma. After an aptitude test mix up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Slate & Company Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. But there's trouble brewing in Bedrock: An evil executive and his sinister secretary are now plotting to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme!

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: The web-spinning superhero must battle his own demons and a barrage of new villains including Sandman and Venom.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is coping with some major life changes. His owner is now married and has a toddler, Liam. Max is so worried about protecting the boy that he develops a nervous tic. On a family trip to a farm, Max and mutt Duke encounter canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a terrifying turkey, all of which only elevates Max's anxiety. Luckily, Max gets some guidance from veteran farm dog Rooster, who pushes Max to ditch his neuroses, find his inner alpha and give Liam a little more freedom.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: Long before the evil Queen Ravenna was vanquished by Snow White's blade, she watched silently as her sister, Freya, suffered a heartbreaking betrayal and fled their kingdom.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: Dr. Seuss' The Lorax is an adaptation of Dr. Seuss' classic tale of a forest creature who shares the enduring power of hope. In the walled city of Thneed-Ville, where everything is artificial and even the air is a commodity, a boy named Ted hopes to win the heart of his dream girl, Audrey. When he learns of her wish to see a real tree, Ted seeks out the Once-ler, a ruined old businessman outside of town in a stark wasteland. Upon hearing of how the hermit gave into his greed for profits and devastated the land over the protests of the Lorax, Ted is inspired to undo the disaster. However, the greedy Mayor of Thneed-Ville, Aloysius O'Hare, has made his fortune exploiting the environmental collapse and is determined to stop the boy from undermining his business.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Follows Morris, who must coach a misfit softball team of his fellow housemates during his mandatory stay at Sweet Dreams sober living in order to get his life back on track.

programme.title: Heart Eyes
programme.desc: A masked maniac with glowing red eyes returns each Valentine's Day to kill couples. An ad exec and her romantic colleague become targets and vow to stop the terror.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Domestic disaster looms for nurse Greg Focker when his straight-laced, ex-CIA father-in-law, Jack Byrnes, asks to meet his parents before the wedding.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously.

programme.title: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: A big-hearted family man's plan for a peaceful getaway at a lakeside resort is ruined when his obnoxious brother-in-law turns up with his weirdo brood.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: It starts with two kids on a cold, cold wet day their mum is at work and they've no games to play! Then in walks the fun in the form of a Cat who pulls out the laughs from the brim of his hat.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world. After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, they worry that they've lost their harmony for good.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: When a bunny is evicted from the Playboy mansion, she hops into the dying Zeta sorority house. Her tutorials in sexy charm make the girls more popular than ever.
